description: The SOC manager wants an interactive map of SSH login attempts to evaluate potential geo-blocking rules. Using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a new dashboard named 'Geospatial_Auth_Activity' in the Search & Reporting app. The dashboard must be a form containing a Time Picker and a dropdown or radio input to filter by authentication status (e.g., 'Failed password' and 'Accepted password'). Include a map visualization panel that queries the 'security_logs' index, uses the input token for dynamic filtering, resolves IP locations with the 'iplocation' command, and aggregates data using 'geostats'.
